[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101110 4
1 1010111 5
2 1101010 4
3 1111000 4
4 0011000 2
5 1001110 4
6 1010010 3
7 0101110 4

01 0100000 1
12 0001100 2
23 1010000 2
34 0101000 2
45 0010101 3
56 0000010 1
67 1000000 1
70 0011000 2 match 4

13 1000000 1
24 0000000 a
35 0000100 1
46 0000111 3

71 0110000 2

05 0000000 a
